reproducer: modal run scripts/modal_{pi0,smolvla}_monolithic_export.py --quality  (for the PyTorch num_steps=1 vs num_steps=10 characterization)
note: Two separate measurements. (1) quality — PyTorch-only: num_steps=1 vs num_steps=10 sample_actions output drift (both are PyTorch eager, same mask behavior). (2) shipped_num_steps10 — our monolithic ONNX at num_steps=10 vs PyTorch sample_actions(num_steps=10). The shipped ONNX uses a create_causal_mask=None shim to unblock torch.export, which costs cos parity (0.977 vs 1.0). v0.3 target: restore cos=1.0 by patching Gemma's inner attention forward to use the 4D explicit mask pi0 constructs.

pi0.verdict: ship with approximation disclosure (prefix-pad masking gap under ccm=None shim)

smolvla.verdict: PASS — machine precision (ccm=None shim has no semantic impact on SmolLM2 attention path)
